column1: I know Jill lives in the north of England but at the moment I can't think______the name of the towm.
Shouting_______people is very rude, never do it.
I'm reading a new book by Tony Parsons. Have you heard________him?
Teenagers usually begin thinking seriously_______their future careers.
I haven't heard_________my cousin Tina for a long time. I'm going to give her a call myself.
With three kids on her hands Polly couldn't even dream________continuing her education.
The man on the opposite bank of the river was shouting something__________me but I couldn't hear him.
